Package grafiosch.gtnet.handler.impl

package grafiosch.gtnet.handler.impl
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    grafiosch.gtnet.handler
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AdminMessageAnnouncementHandler
    Handler for admin-to-admin messages (GT_NET_ADMIN_MESSAGE_SEL_C).
    DataRequestAcceptHandler
    Handler for GT_NET_DATA_REQUEST_ACCEPT_S messages.
    DataRequestHandler
    Handler for GT_NET_DATA_REQUEST_SEL_RR_C messages.
    DataRequestRejectedHandler
    Handler for GT_NET_DATA_REQUEST_REJECTED_S messages.
    DataRevokeHandler
    Handler for GT_NET_DATA_REVOKE_SEL_C messages.
    FirstHandshakeRequestHandler
    Handler for GT_NET_FIRST_HANDSHAKE_SEL_RR_S messages (incoming handshake requests).
    MaintenanceAnnouncementHandler
    Handler for GT_NET_MAINTENANCE_ALL_C messages.
    OfflineAnnouncementHandler
    Handler for GT_NET_OFFLINE_ALL_C messages.
    OperationDiscontinuedHandler
    Handler for GT_NET_OPERATION_DISCONTINUED_ALL_C messages.
    PingMessageHandler
    Handler for GT_NET_PING messages.
    ServerlistResponseHandler
    Handler for server list response messages (accept and reject).
    ServerlistRevokeHandler
    Handler for GT_NET_UPDATE_SERVERLIST_REVOKE_SEL_C messages.
    SettingsUpdatedAnnouncementHandler
    Handler for GT_NET_SETTINGS_UPDATED_ALL_C messages.
    TokenRefreshRequestHandler
    Handler for GT_NET_TOKEN_REFRESH_SEL_RR_C messages (token refresh requests).
    UpdateServerlistRequestHandler
    Handler for GT_NET_UPDATE_SERVERLIST_SEL_RR_C messages.
